## Summary

What does this PR change?

## Type of change

- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Templates
- [ ] Skills
- [ ] Scripts

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `./scripts/doctor.sh`
- [ ] I ran `./scripts/sanitize_scan.sh`
- [ ] I checked for path / identity / secret leakage

## Public-safe checklist

- [ ] No real private vault content included
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private endpoints, or internal hostnames included
- [ ] Any screenshots or examples are sanitized
- [ ] Hard-coded local assumptions were avoided or replaced with placeholders

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to?
